# @platform/notification-runtime

Notification service abstraction: push, in-app, and browser notification channel interface and delivery contracts.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @platform/notification-runtime
Version: 0.1.0
Component: notification-runtime
Type: library
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: operations
Bounded context: notification-service
Owner: team-platform
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: active
Role: platform
Class: active.platform
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: quarterly
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-platform
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Define the typed notification send interface for push, in-app, and browser channels
- Declare notification payload schemas and delivery channel contracts
- Provide a channel registry for registering concrete delivery adapters per channel
- Decouple feature packages from specific push notification providers

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not implement push delivery to FCM, APNs, or Web Push (owned by concrete adapters)
- Does not own notification preference or opt-out state (owned by profile-configuration)
- Does not manage notification history or read-state persistence

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Imported by feature packages to dispatch notifications across channels
- Concrete channel adapters are registered at application startup via the channel registry

application

```text
None
```

## Operational notes

- Delivery is best-effort by default ? channels that require at-least-once must be backed by queue-runtime
- Notification payloads must not contain PII beyond what is necessary for delivery
